ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_incl_tax" TEXT /* Total cost of the order, including tax */,
  "total_excl_tax" TEXT /* Total cost of the order, excluding tax */,
  "shipping_incl_tax" TEXT /* Shipping cost, including tax */,
  "shipping_excl_tax" TEXT /* Shipping cost, excluding tax */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "order_channel" TEXT /* Sales channel (e.g., online, offline) */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual delivery date */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method used */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the order */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Shipping address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price_incl_tax" TEXT /* Price of the product, including tax */,
  "price_excl_tax" TEXT /* Price of the product, excluding tax */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier who provides the product */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock-keeping unit of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product being ordered */,
  "price_incl_tax" TEXT /* Price of the product, including tax */,
  "price_excl_tax" TEXT /* Price of the product, excluding tax */,
  "discount_amount" TEXT /* Discount amount applied to the item */,
  "coupon_code" TEXT /* Coupon code used for the item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person at the supplier */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person at the supplier */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the supplier was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the supplier was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory item */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being tracked */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the product in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "last_stock_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last stock update */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory item was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_addresses" (
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping address */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the address belongs to */,
  "address" TEXT /* Shipping address */,
  "address_type" TEXT /* Type of address (e.g., home, work) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the shipping address was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the shipping address was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_addresses_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the payment method belongs to */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "card_number" TEXT /* Last 4 digits of the card number */,
  "card_expiry" TEXT /* Card expiry date */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment method was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment method was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_methods_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders_shipping" (
  "order_shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order shipping item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being shipped */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping address */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method (e.g., ground, air) */,
  "shipping_cost_incl_tax" TEXT /* Shipping cost, including tax */,
  "shipping_cost_excl_tax" TEXT /* Shipping cost, excluding tax */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Name of the shipping carrier */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the shipping information was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the shipping information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_shipping_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_shipping_shipping_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_address_id") REFERENCES shipping_addresses ("shipping_address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "taxes" (
  "tax_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax */,
  "tax_rate" TEXT /* Tax rate */,
  "tax_rule" TEXT /* Tax rule (e.g., VAT, sales tax) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country for which the tax rate applies */,
  "state" TEXT /* State for which the tax rate applies */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tax rate was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tax rate was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items_tax" (
  "order_item_tax_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item tax */,
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order item the tax belongs to */,
  "tax_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tax */,
  "tax_amount_incl_tax" TEXT /* Tax amount, including tax */,
  "tax_amount_excl_tax" TEXT /* Tax amount, excluding tax */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tax information was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tax information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_tax_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_tax_tax_id FOREIGN KEY ("tax_id") REFERENCES taxes ("tax_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_tax_order_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_item_id") REFERENCES order_items ("order_item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, sales staff) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status" (
  "order_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order status */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the status belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the status was updated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_status_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
